themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents designed to perform research tasks autonomously, including execution, coordination, and self-correction.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles focusing on various AI-powered tools and platforms designed to assist in research processes, from literature review to data analysis.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content related to AI tools that aid developers in writing, debugging, and understanding code.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Articles about AI's capability to condense large amounts of text or data into concise summaries, providing key insights.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: Content on how AI is being used to enhance product development, strategy, and management processes.

themes.name: AI customer insights
themes.description: Articles detailing how AI is leveraged to extract valuable understanding and patterns from customer data and behavior.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Focuses on AI applications for automating, enhancing, or analyzing usability testing processes.

themes.name: AI-assisted recruitment
themes.description: Articles discussing the use of AI in various stages of the hiring process, from sourcing to candidate evaluation.

themes.name: AI research tools comparison
themes.description: Articles that compare and evaluate different AI tools available for research purposes.

themes.name: AI survey tools
themes.description: Content related to AI-powered tools designed to create, distribute, analyze, or optimize surveys.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
